tools.name: golangci-lint
tools.notes: Configured with errcheck, gosimple, govet, ineffassign, staticcheck, typecheck, unused, goconst, gofmt, goimports. Pre-commit hook also runs prettier for non-Go files.

linting.notes: Lint runs via pre-commit hooks in CI (pre-commit run --all-files). The .golangci.yaml has some deprecated config options that generate warnings but don't fail the build.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses golang/mock for generating mocks (mockgen). Mock files follow *_mock.go naming pattern.
testing.notes: Project has 6 sub-packages (model-mesh-mlserver-adapter, model-mesh-ovms-adapter, model-mesh-torchserve-adapter, model-mesh-triton-adapter, model-serving-puller, pullman). Each has its own scripts/run_tests.sh. The main scripts/run_tests.sh runs all sub-package tests sequentially. Some sub-package tests build mock servers before running tests. Test scripts use bash-specific syntax but have #!/bin/sh shebang - requires bash to run.

gating_checks.name: test / Run lint
gating_checks.notes: Runs inside develop container image built from Dockerfile. Executes pre-commit run --all-files which runs golangci-lint and prettier.

gating_checks.name: test / Run unit test
gating_checks.notes: Runs inside develop container. Executes ./scripts/run_tests.sh which tests all 6 sub-packages.

advisory_checks.name: build / Build and push runtime image
advisory_checks.notes: Multi-platform build (linux/amd64, linux/arm64). Runs on PRs but doesn't push. Only pushes on main branch.

ci.notes: CI builds a developer container (kserve/modelmesh-runtime-adapter-develop) based on UBI9 go-toolset:1.23 with pre-commit, protoc, and go tools installed. Tests run inside this container. The test workflow is triggered on PRs to main or release-* branches.

build.build_command: make build (builds Docker image) or go build -o <binary> <package>/main.go
build.notes: Multi-stage Dockerfile with 'develop' stage for local dev, 'build' stage for compilation, and 'runtime' stage for final image. The runtime image includes Python 3.11 and tensorflow for model conversion. Builds 5 different binaries: puller, triton-adapter, mlserver-adapter, ovms-adapter, torchserve-adapter.

conventions.test_naming: Standard Go conventions: Test* functions, table-driven tests with t.Run for subtests
conventions.import_style: Standard Go import grouping: stdlib, external packages, internal packages. goimports enforces formatting.
conventions.notes: Uses golang/mock for mocking gRPC services. Proto files in internal/proto/ with generated .pb.go files. License headers required on all files (scripts/add_headers.sh).

lint_commands.notes: Passed with exit code 0. Generated some config deprecation warnings but no lint errors.

test_commands.notes: Runs tests for all 6 sub-packages. Validated pullman and mlserver-adapter successfully. Requires bash due to ${BASH_SOURCE[0]} usage in scripts.
Alternative command that runs all tests recursively. Tested internal/util successfully.

container_recipe.notes: Test scripts have a minor portability issue: they use #!/bin/sh but contain bash syntax. Must run with bash explicitly or ensure /bin/sh is bash. The CI environment uses UBI9 where this isn't an issue. Some sub-package tests build mock servers before running (e.g., mlserver-adapter builds main and mockmlserver binaries).

results.output_snippet:
level=warning msg="[config_reader] The configuration option `output.format` is deprecated, please use `output.formats`"
level=warning msg="[config_reader] The configuration option `linters.govet.check-shadowing` is deprecated. Please enable `shadow` instead, if you are not using `enable-all`."
level=warning msg="[config_reader] The configuration option `linters.errcheck.ignore` is deprecated, please use `linters.errcheck.exclude-functions`."
results.notes: Linter passed successfully. Config warnings are due to deprecated golangci-lint options in .golangci.yaml, but they don't prevent successful linting.

results.notes: Internal utility tests passed: 2 tests for gRPC endpoint resolution and secure path joining

validation.summary: All validation steps passed. Lint OK (config warnings only), tests OK (22+ tests across 3 validated packages). Total validation time ~15s excluding installs.

gaps: Test scripts use #!/bin/sh shebang but contain bash-specific syntax (${BASH_SOURCE[0]}). Works in CI (UBI9 base) but requires explicit bash invocation on systems where /bin/sh is dash/ash.
No coverage threshold configured or enforced in CI
Pre-commit configuration uses deprecated golangci-lint options (output.format, linters.govet.check-shadowing, linters.errcheck.ignore) - should update .golangci.yaml to remove warnings
No documented way to run a single sub-package's tests without entering the directory (would need make target like 'make test-pullman')
CI runs tests inside a custom Docker image which adds setup complexity for local development
